title: rtransparency: Identify Indicators of Transparency in the Biomedical Literature
description: An R package that automatically detects eight indicators of research transparency in full-text biomedical articles (PubMed Central XML or plain text): conflict-of-interest disclosure, funding disclosure, protocol registration, novelty, replication or external validation, data sharing, code sharing, and disclosure of generative-AI use. For each indicator it returns a boolean prediction and the exact triggering text, with reproducible accuracy benchmarks.
